info.name: Questions
info.description: Individual question management — update content or deactivate a question.

request.description:
Update a question's text, explanation, difficulty, and/or choices.

**Requires:** Bearer token (must own the parent question set)

**Path params:**
- `question_id` — UUID

**Body fields (all optional):**
- `text` — question text
- `explanation` — explanation shown after answering
- `difficulty` — `easy` | `medium` | `hard`
- `choices` — exactly 4 choices, exactly 1 must have `is_correct: true`

**Returns:** `QuestionResponse` (200)

Soft-delete (deactivate) a question so it no longer appears in quizzes.

**Requires:** Bearer token (must own the parent question set)

**Path params:**
- `question_id` — UUID

**Returns:** 204 No Content
